title: Epic Ring applies Hit +4 and Atk +4 while equipped

plan.title: Epic Ring applies Hit +4 and Atk +4 while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Epic Ring to a modifier-zero primary creature, run a battle, and verify the hit bonus and attack damage bonus.

notes: Place test_primary_creature_mod_0 on player_1 field as primary so modifiers come only from Epic Ring.

steps: Player 1 plays Epic Ring and equips it to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.
Inspect the resolved hit roll and damage dealt.

expectedAssertions.label: Attack damage includes the +4 Atk bonus

manualVerification: Confirm both modifiers apply only while Epic Ring remains equipped.
riskNotes: Uses battle output for Hit and Atk bonuses.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Epic Ring Hit/Atk equip modifier.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
